settings.text: Miura Golf and Reigning Champ Announce Unique Club and Apparel Collaboration

For the first time ever, legendary Japanese irons forger Miura Golf is teaming up with a non-golf specific brand, Vancouver-based athleticwear maker Reigning Champ. This exciting collaboration brings together the craftsmanship and precision of Miura with the sleek, contemporary design of Reigning Champ, resulting in a limited-edition drop of golf clubs and apparel.

Miura Golf is renowned for its high-quality collaborations, having worked with golf legends like Jack Nicklaus, Adam Scott, and brands such as Greyson. This new partnership with Reigning Champ marks a significant departure from their traditional collaborations, venturing outside the golf-specific realm.

The centerpiece of this collaboration is a unique set of premium hand-forged Miura MB-101 irons, featuring a composite of the Miura and Reigning Champ logos. These exclusive irons, available in a set from 3-PW, come with branded ferrules and numerous custom options, embodying the dedication to innovation and timeless design that both brands share.

The collaboration also includes an eight-piece apparel collection, featuring co-branded items such as a nylon jacket, polo, T-shirt, pullover, shorts, and two hats. Each piece in the collection reflects the meticulous craftsmanship and quality for which both brands are known.

Reigning Champ founder Craig Atkinson emphasized the shared values and standards between the two brands, stating, "The capsule of co-branded apparel we released was designed for a discerning audience and reaffirms each brand's strength within the marketplace."

Explore the exclusive Miura x Reigning Champ collection and elevate your game with this blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern design.
